title: Romantic Venezuelan Fruit Empanadas
description: A sweet and tender pastry filled with a mixture of fruits and floral notes, perfect for a romantic evening, this dish is vegan friendly and features a shortcrust pastry and nimono simmer.

ingredients.name: mixed fruits
ingredients.notes: such as strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and cold vegan butter to make the shortcrust pastry.
Gradually add the water to the mixing bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and cut out circles of pastry.
In a separate bowl, mix the granulated sugar, rose water, and lemon juice.
Add the mixed fruits to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar mixture.
Place a spoonful of the fruit mixture onto one half of each pastry circle.
Fold the other half of the pastry circle over the filling to form a half moon shape and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little water and sprinkle with cornstarch.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the empanadas from the oven and let cool before serving.
